codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly prevents duplicate user registration by checking if an existing user has credentials before allowing the registration ceremony to proceed. When a user already has registered passkeys, the handler returns HTTP 409 Conflict with a clear 'email already registered' error message. The implementation properly handles the edge case where a user exists but has no credentials (incomplete registration), allowing them to resume registration. The code follows project conventions with structured logging and proper error handling.

summary: Feature 'auth-prevent-duplicate-registration' passes code review. The implementation correctly enforces unique email constraint by checking for existing credentials before registration, returns appropriate 409 Conflict status with clear error message, and handles incomplete registration scenarios. All 5 new test cases pass and cover the expected behaviors specified in VAL-AUTH-010 and VAL-AUTH-011. No blocking issues found.
